<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#pyo3|pyo3]]
    - [[#pyo3#基本使用|基本使用]]
      - [[#pyo3#基本使用#python调用rust函数|python调用rust函数]]
        - [[#pyo3#基本使用#python调用rust函数#cargo配置|cargo配置]]
        - [[#pyo3#基本使用#python调用rust函数#编写rust|编写rust]]
        - [[#pyo3#基本使用#python调用rust函数#编写python|编写python]]
      - [[#pyo3#基本使用#rust调用python函数|rust调用python函数]]
        - [[#pyo3#基本使用#rust调用python函数#cargo配置|cargo配置]]
        - [[#pyo3#基本使用#rust调用python函数#编写rust|编写rust]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template

= pyo3 =
pyo3是rust和python之间的绑定库,既可以从rust使用python函数也可以从python使用rust
== 基本使用 ==
=== python调用rust函数 ===
==== cargo配置 ====
编译后的文件名为`libname.so`,需要手动改成`name.so`,这样才能从python中直接引用
{{{class="rust"
[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]
[dependencies.pyo3]
version = "0.2"
features = ["extension-module"]
}}}
==== 编写rust ====
| `#![feature(proc_macro, specialization)]` | 使用预编译宏的前提 |
| `#[py::modinit(hello)]`                   | 导出mod            |
| `#[pyfn(m, "run_rust_func")]`             | 导出函数           |
{{{class="rust"
#![feature(proc_macro, specialization)]
extern crate pyo3;
use pyo3::{py, Python, PyResult, PyModule, PyString};
#[py::modinit(hello)]
fn init_module(py: Python, m: &PyModule) -> PyResult<()> {
    #[pyfn(m, "run_rust_func")]
    fn run(name: &PyString) -> PyResult<()> {
        println!("Rust says: Hello {} of Python!", name);
        Ok(())
    }
    Ok(())
}
}}}
==== 编写python ====
使用函数:只要把so放进路径里就能直接用了
{{{class="python"
import hello
hello.run_rust_func()
}}}

=== rust调用python函数 ===
==== cargo配置 ====
`cargo init --bin`中配置上依赖
{{{class="rust"
[dependencies]
pyo3 = "0.2"
}}}
==== 编写rust ====
无需特殊语法,只用引入python函数
{{{class="rust"
extern crate pyo3;

use pyo3::{Python, PyDict, PyResult, ObjectProtocol};

fn main() {
    let gil = Python::acquire_gil();
    hello(gil.python()).unwrap();
}

fn hello(py: Python) -> PyResult<()> {
    let sys = py.import("sys")?;
    let version: String = sys.get("version")?.extract()?;

    let locals = PyDict::new(py);
    locals.set_item("os", py.import("os")?)?;
    let user: String = py.eval("os.getenv('USER') or os.getenv('USERNAME')", None, Some(&locals))?.extract()?;

    println!("Hello {}, I'm Python {}", user, version);
    Ok(())
}
}}}
